html:
Exclusive to:

Year of the Carrat is an event in Don't Starve Together that began on January 23, 2020 and ended on March 19, 2020.[1] It is inspired by the Chinese Year of the Rat, which started on January 25, 2020 and ends on February 11, 2021. In the Chinese zodiac, each year is related to an animal in a 12-year cycle.

It is similar to the Year of the Gobbler, Year of the Varg, and Year of the Pig King events, which came in the years before, and shares mechanics with them, such as the Offerings crafting filter, and most craftable items from those events. However, there are several additions and differences to be implemented into this event. Players can revisit this event by setting Events to Year of the Carrat in the World Customization menu.

During the official Year of the Carrat event, the Carrat Torch Skin was given to players upon opening the game.

Contents

  • 1 Exclusive Features
    • 1.1 Craftable Structures
    • 1.2 Mobs
    • 1.3 Items
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Gallery
  • 4 Sounds
  • 5 References

Exclusive Features

  • Carrat Shrine
  • Starting Point
  • Finish Line
  • Checkpoint
  • Navigation Gym
  • Reflex Gym
  • Speed Gym
  • Endurance Gym
  • Carrat Scale

Mobs

  • Carrat
  • Charlie's Carrat

Items

  • Starting Point Kit
  • Finish Line Kit
  • Checkpoint Kit
  • Navigation Gym Kit
  • Reflex Gym Kit
  • Speed Gym Kit
  • Endurance Gym Kit
  • Carrat Scale Kit
  • Seed Packet

  • Red Firecrackers
  • Red Lantern
  • Floating Lantern
  • Sky Lantern
  • Jubilantern Post Kit
  • Lucky Beast Head
  • Lucky Beast Body
  • Lucky Beast Tail

Trivia

  • The main menu features an animation of Winona holding a winning Carrat which ear and tail color is randomly chosen each time the player logs in.
  • In Rhymes with Play # 271, a developer stated that the special theme for this event was inspired by "Gonna Fly Now", the theme from the movie Rocky.
  • While training a carrat at any of the gym pieces, the Year of the Carrat theme will play. A reference to training montages, popularized by the above-mentioned movie series.
  • Carrats found on the backs of Beefalo and the Carrat races are a reference to the Chinese legend of how the order for the Chinese Zodiac was made.

Exclusive to:
Year of the Carrat
Dates
2020: January 23 - March 19
Preceded by
Year of the Pig King
Succeeded by
Year of the Beefalo
Year of the Carrat is an event in Don't Starve Together that began on January 23, 2020 and ended on March 19, 2020.[1] It is inspired by the Chinese Year of the Rat, which started on January 25, 2020 and ends on February 11, 2021. In the Chinese zodiac, each year is related to an animal in a 12-year cycle.
It is similar to the Year of the Gobbler, Year of the Varg, and Year of the Pig King events, which came in the years before, and shares mechanics with them, such as the Offerings crafting filter, and most craftable items from those events. However, there are several additions and differences to be implemented into this event. Players can revisit this event by setting Events to Year of the Carrat in the World Customization menu.
During the official Year of the Carrat event, the Carrat Torch Skin was given to players upon opening the game.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
The main menu features an animation of Winona holding a winning Carrat which ear and tail color is randomly chosen each time the player logs in.
In Rhymes with Play # 271, a developer stated that the special theme for this event was inspired by "Gonna Fly Now", the theme from the movie Rocky.
While training a carrat at any of the gym pieces, the Year of the Carrat theme will play. A reference to training montages, popularized by the above-mentioned movie series.
Carrats found on the backs of Beefalo and the Carrat races are a reference to the Chinese legend of how the order for the Chinese Zodiac was made.

title: Year of the Carrat
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}
{{Event Infobox
|image = Year of the Carrat Promo.png
|dates = '''2020:''' January 23 - March 19
|precededby = [[Year of the Pig King]]
|succeededby = [[Year of the Beefalo]]
}}
'''Year of the Carrat''' is an [[:Category:Events|event]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' that began on January 23, 2020 and ended on March 19, 2020.<ref>[https://forums.kleientertainment.com/forums/topic/115142-the-year-of-the-carrat-begins-this-thursday/ The Year of the Carrat Begins This Thursday!] Posted January 21, 2020.</ref> It is inspired by the Chinese Year of the Rat, which started on January 25, 2020 and ends on February 11, 2021. In the [[Wikipedia:Chinese zodiac|Chinese zodiac]], each year is related to an animal in a 12-year cycle.

It is similar to the [[Year of the Gobbler]], [[Year of the Varg]], and [[Year of the Pig King]] events, which came in the years before, and shares mechanics with them, such as the Offerings crafting filter, and most craftable items from those events. However, there are several additions and differences to be implemented into this event. Players can revisit this event by setting ''Events'' to ''Year of the Carrat'' in the [[World Customization/Don't Starve Together|World Customization]] menu.

During the official Year of the Carrat event, the Carrat Torch [[Belongings|Skin]] was given to players upon opening the game.

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The main menu features an animation of Winona holding a winning Carrat which ear and tail color is randomly chosen each time the player logs in.
* In ''Rhymes with Play'' # 271, a developer stated that the special theme for this event was inspired by "[[wikipedia:Gonna Fly Now|Gonna Fly Now]]", the theme from the movie ''[[wikipedia:Rocky|Rocky]]''.
* While training a carrat at any of the gym pieces, the Year of the Carrat theme will play. A reference to training montages, popularized by the above-mentioned movie series.
*Carrats found on the backs of Beefalo and the Carrat races are a reference to the Chinese legend of how the order for the Chinese Zodiac was made.
